scripts.deploy:staging: cross-env CLOUDFLARE_ENV=staging pnpm build && pnpm --dir apps/web exec wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: cross-env CLOUDFLARE_ENV=production pnpm build && pnpm --dir apps/web exec wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.db:migrate:local: pnpm --dir apps/web exec wrangler d1 execute alabiblio-local-db --remote --file ../../sql/migrations/0001_core_sources_centers.sql
scripts.db:migrate:staging: pnpm --dir apps/web exec wrangler d1 execute alabiblio-staging-db --remote --file ../../sql/migrations/0001_core_sources_centers.sql
scripts.db:migrate:production: pnpm --dir apps/web exec wrangler d1 execute alabiblio-production-db --remote --file ../../sql/migrations/0001_core_sources_centers.sql
scripts.db:seed:local: pnpm --dir apps/web exec wrangler d1 execute alabiblio-local-db --remote --file ../../sql/seeds/0001_sources.sql
scripts.db:seed:staging: pnpm --dir apps/web exec wrangler d1 execute alabiblio-staging-db --remote --file ../../sql/seeds/0001_sources.sql
scripts.db:seed:production: pnpm --dir apps/web exec wrangler d1 execute alabiblio-production-db --remote --file ../../sql/seeds/0001_sources.sql
